title: Design Review 2026 05 28

decisions.title: We decided to standardize on Nova's canonical NotificationBell for everyone.
decisions.decision: We decided to standardize on Nova's canonical NotificationBell for everyone.
decisions.rationale: Captured from meeting transcript; confirm with attendees.

decisions.title: Let's go with waiting until v3 ships, then Horizon migrates.
decisions.decision: Let's go with waiting until v3 ships, then Horizon migrates.

decisions.title: We'll adopt that sequencing.

action_items.task: Today we need to settle the notification component situation.
action_items.quote: Amara Osei: Today we need to settle the notification component situation.

action_items.task: I'll update the Horizon Figma file to use Nova's component by Friday.
action_items.quote: Jamal Foster: I'll update the Horizon Figma file to use Nova's component by Friday.

action_items.task: Can you confirm the new Modal is dev-ready?
action_items.quote: Priya Nair: Can you confirm the new Modal is dev-ready?

action_items.task: Priya, you'll need to update AuthModal to the new tokens.
action_items.quote: Lucia Ferreira: Priya, you'll need to update AuthModal to the new tokens.
Priya Nair: I will take that.

action_items.task: I'll have the AuthModal updated by next Wednesday.
action_items.quote: Priya Nair: I'll have the AuthModal updated by next Wednesday.

action_items.task: One more thing — Team Atlas needs to expose the notification count via the API for the bell to work.
action_items.quote: Amara Osei: One more thing — Team Atlas needs to expose the notification count via the API for the bell to work.

action_items.task: Let's have someone sync with Atlas this week.
action_items.quote: Amara Osei: Let's have someone sync with Atlas this week.

action_items.task: Action item: I'll reach out to Jordan on the Atlas team by end of week.
action_items.quote: Amara Osei: Action item: I'll reach out to Jordan on the Atlas team by end of week.

risks: There's a risk here though — if Horizon swaps the component before we ship design system v3, the color tokens will change again and they'll have to redo it.
That's a dependency we should flag.
I'm a little worried Atlas isn't aware of this dependency yet.
Last risk — the design review process itself.
summary: Design Review 2026 05 28 — 3 decisions, 9 action items, 5 risks. Participants: Amara Osei, Jamal Foster, Lucia Ferreira, Priya Nair.
